transcript_quality: summary only — no call recording on file
lead_profile_text: Existing STL property with Hello Guest since December 2025 — severely underperforming. Only 3 reviews in 5+ months; last-minute bookings disabled; poor platform visibility; communication issues due to Hello Guest's volume-based approach. Previously self-managed with better results. Break-even requirement 14–16 nights/month. Currently under financial pressure.
emotional_profile: Cautiously engaged — burned by prior management contract with Hello Guest. Under financial pressure. Responds to logic (immediate listing improvements) and social proof (review accumulation speed vs Hello Guest). Fast mover once confidence is established.
delay_timeline: Follow-up call scheduled 22 May 2026; offer expires 31 May 2026

top_objections.text: Concern about 6-month minimum term given current financial pressure — has already been burned by a management contract with Hello Guest
top_objections.zac_response: Framed 6 months as a structured performance period with defined review point, not a lock-in; proposed June 1st start date with immediate cutoff possible; Zac to send management agreement with discount offer

top_questions.text: What protections and review points exist within the 6-month minimum term?
top_questions.answer: Stayful proposes defined month-3 performance review point with explicit exit conditions — follow-up call 22 May to clarify

what_moved_them: Last-minute bookings being re-enabled — a significant ongoing revenue leak under Hello Guest
Listing improvements: dedicated workspace (currently unadvertised), gated car park with CCTV (currently unadvertised), free street parking as backup option

conversion_gaps.gap: 6-month minimum term commitment under financial pressure after prior bad management contract
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Provide clear, specific response to 6-month term — define month-3 performance review point and explicit exit conditions. Frame as structured performance period, not a repeat of Hello Guest experience.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (reduced from 15%) if signed by 31 May 2026. June 1st start date proposed.
